title: LearnForge Topic Pack
description: Schema for LearnForge topic packs (D-02, Draft 2020-12). Pack-level additionalProperties is true (Q7 lock) to keep evolving fields non-breaking. Per-module strings carry maxLength caps as R1 prompt-injection mitigation.

allOf.$comment: Authored packs (no exportVersion) keep strict kebab-case ids + a curated domain enum. Exported courses carry exportVersion and bare-UUID runtime ids + the wizard-default 'general' domain; import re-namespaces every id (D-06), so the format gate has no safety value there and would break the D-05 round-trip. This conditional applies the strict authored constraints only when exportVersion is absent.

id.description: Identifier. Authored packs: kebab-case matching directory name (enforced by the authored-only conditional). Exported courses: bare runtime id (re-namespaced on import).

domain_module.description: Authored packs are restricted to the curated enum via the authored-only conditional. Exported courses carry the runtime value verbatim (e.g. the wizard default 'general').

pack_version.description: Author-controlled semantic version. D-01 extension; optional, defaults to '1.0'.

source.description: Derived at load time (NOT authored). Listed for schema completeness.

requires_docker.description: Informational only (Q5 lock). Per-lab `requires_docker` is the authoritative runtime gate.

exportVersion.description: Semver of the exporter that produced this file. Absent on authored packs; its presence relaxes the authored id/domain constraints (see top-level allOf).

exportedAt.description: RFC3339 timestamp. Absent on authored packs.

exportedFrom.description: Provenance marker, e.g. 'imported:my-export.json'. D-06. For licensed packs, encoded as 'licensed:{id}|{licensor}' (pipe-delimited, g73).

licensor.description: Optional licensing-entity display name. Currently carried inside exportedFrom as 'licensed:{id}|{licensor}'; reserved here for a future dedicated field.

blocks.description: Map of module_id -> array of ModuleBlock rows (D-02 fidelity).

labs.description: Map of module_id -> array of lab specs (D-03 image-ref only).

videos.description: Map of section_id -> array of cached LessonVideo rows (D-04).

signature.description: Optional Phase 14 pack-signing envelope (D-04 minimal shape). NOT in the top-level `required` array — unsigned free packs stay schema-valid (D-09). Fields inside this block are NOT covered by the signature itself.

alg.description: Signature algorithm identifier — always 'ed25519' in Phase 14.

keyFingerprint.description: Hex fingerprint of the issuer signing key. String, never a number (Pitfall 3).

sig.description: Hex-encoded Ed25519 signature over JCS(pack minus signature). String, never a number (Pitfall 3).

issuerId.description: Stable issuer identity (tenant key for Hub). String, never a number (Pitfall 3).

name.description: Human-readable publisher name (rendered as React text child only).

publicKeyPem.description: PEM-encoded Ed25519 public key that signs packs for this issuer.

rootSig.description: Hex-encoded root signature over JCS(cert minus rootSig). String, never a number (Pitfall 3).

id.description: Authored packs: kebab-case (enforced by the authored-only conditional). Exported courses: bare runtime module id (re-namespaced on import, D-06).

objectives.description: R1 mitigation: maxItems: 12 + per-item maxLength: 280 caps prompt-injection payload size when objectives flow into PagePlanner.

from.description: Module id reference. Authored packs: kebab-case (enforced by the authored-only conditional). Exported courses: bare runtime module id.

to.description: Module id reference. Authored packs: kebab-case (enforced by the authored-only conditional). Exported courses: bare runtime module id.
